--- Page 1 ---
To  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Ref: KS/Mar/26/041 
Ministry Of Petroleum And Natural Gas  
 
 
 
Date: 23.03.2026 
Indian Oil Corporation Limited  
IOCL Haldia Refinery  
Materials Stores Department  
Haldia - 721606 
 
Bid Number: GEM/2026/B/7319588, Dated:  05-03-2026 
 
 
Dear Sir, 
We would like to inform you that we are accepting all the below mentioned Terms & conditions     
 
 
 
 
Buyer Added Bid Specific Terms and Conditions 
 
1. Generic 
OPTION CLAUSE: The Purchaser reserves the right to increase or decrease the quantity to be 
ordered up to 25 percent of bid quantity at the time of placement of contract. The purchaser also 
reserves the right to increase the ordered quantity up to 25% of the contracted quantity during the 
currency of the contract at the contracted rates. The delivery period of quantity shall commence 
from the last date of original delivery order and in cases where option clause is exercised during 
the extended delivery period the additional time shall commence from the last date of extended 
delivery period. The additional delivery time shall be (Increased quantity ÷ Original quantity) × 
Original delivery period (in days), subject to minimum of 30 days. If the original delivery period is 
less than 30 days, the additional time equals the original delivery period. The Purchaser may 
extend this calculated delivery duration up to the original delivery period while exercising the option 
clause. Bidders must comply with these terms. -- Accepted 
 
2. Generic 
Bidder shall submit the following documents along with their bid for Vendor Code    Creation:  
a. Copy of PAN Card. 
b. Copy of GSTIN. 
c. Copy of Cancelled Cheque. 
d. Copy of EFT Mandate duly certified by Bank…. Attached 
 
3. Generic 
Supplier shall ensure that the Invoice is raised in the name of Consignee with GSTIN of Consignee 
only…. Accepted 
 
4. Generic 
While generating invoice in GeM portal, the seller must upload scanned copy of GST invoice and 
the screenshot of GST portal confirming payment of GST…….. Accepted 
 
5. Scope of Supply 
Scope of supply (Bid price to include all cost components): Only supply of Goods……. Accepted 
 
Thanking you,  
For Krypton Systems  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Joyanta Mitra

--- Page 2 ---
Dated: 03-09-2026 
MAF Number – MAFIN504624 
To, 
Iocl Haldia Refinery 
MATERIALS PURCHASE DEPARTMENT  IOCL HALDIA REFINERY 
HALDIA 
West Bengal  - 721606 
 
Subject: Authorization letter from Manufacturer of Equipment; refer Tender GEM/2026/B/7319588 
We M/s HP India Sales Private Limited (formerly known as Hewlett-Packard India Sales Private Limited), 
having our registered office at No. 24, Salarpuria Arena, Hosur Main Road, Adugodi, Bangalore - 560030 
are established and reputed manufacturers of ,Desktops (HP Products). We hereby confirm that M/s 
Krypton Systems whose office is at 103,Harish Mukherjee Rd  Kolkata  West Bengal  700026 is an 
authorized reseller of HP Products. The above reseller is authorized to provide a bid/quote for these 
products and enter into contracts for the same independently with you in respect of the above tender. 
We hereby confirm that the HP Products shall bear our standard OEM Warranty and Support. 
Thanking You 
For HP India Sales Private Limited 
 
 
 
 
 
 
(Authorized Signatory) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Name: Venkatesh B S 
Designation: Partner Account Operations Manager 
Email ID: venkatesh.b-s1@hp.com 
Contact No.: +91 9845546486 
Venkatesh (Mar 9, 2026 18:28:20 GMT+5.5)
Venkatesh

HP Amplify Membership Certificate
Effective November 1, 2025 to October 31, 2026.
Company Legal Name: Krypton Systems (2-SISC-8449)
Company DBA Name: Krypton Systems
is a member of the HP Amplify Partner Program with the following designation(s):
HP Amplify Synergy Partner
Kobi Elbaz

HP India Sales Pvt. Ltd. 
Ground Floor, Block 2, DLF 
Downtown Commercial Site, 
Block - V, Gurugram, 
Haryana India - 122002 
 
 
HP India Sales Private Limited. Formerly known as Hewlett-Packard India Sales Private Limited, Regd. Office: No. 24, 
Kothari Arena, Hosur Main Road, Adugodi, Bengaluru– 560 030 
Phone No: 080 3382 9000 Fax No: - 3382 9899 Website: www.hpindia.com 
 
 
 
Date: 20th March 2026 
 
To,  
AM (MAT) IOCL Haldia Refinery, 
INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LIMITED, 
INDIAN OIL Corporation Limited, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (Swagata Monda 
 
Sub: Support link to checking. 
 
Ref. GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated : 05-3-2026 
 
Dear Sir/Ma’am, 
 
With reference to above mentioned Gem bid no GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated : 05-3-2026.  
 
Please find below supporting links of for your kind perusal. 
 
1. The OEM must have an online system hardware diagnostics facility or a BIOS-based 
hardware diagnostics facility. OEM must have the facility to download the updates of 
preinstalled Software, device drivers and firmware from its website. – following are the links 
for checking. 
 
• 
https://support.hp.com/in-en/check-warranty 
• 
https://support.hp.com/in-en/help/hp-pc-hardware-diagnostics 
• 
https://support.hp.com/us-en/document/ish_2025988-1592331-16 
 
 
For and on Behalf of HP India Sales Pvt Ltd 
 
 
 
Authorized Signatory 
Name:  
Vibhor Gupta 
Designation:  
Regional Sales Manager 
Email: 
 
Vibhor.gupta@hp.com 
Mob.: 
 
+91 9654450334

--- Page 5 ---
HP India Sales Private Limited. Formerly known as Hewlett-Packard India Sales Private Limited,Regd. Office: No. 24, 
Kothari Arena, Hosur Main Road, Adugodi, Bengaluru– 560 030 
Phone No: 080 3382 9000 Fax No: - 3382 9899 Website: www.hpindia.com 
 
HP India Sales Pvt. Ltd. 
Ground Floor, Block 2, DLF 
Downtown Commercial Site, 
Block - V, Gurugram, 
Haryana India - 122002 
 
 
Date: 20th M a r c h , 2026 
TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN 
 
 
Sub: Undertaking regarding Original (Windows) 
Ref : GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated : 05-03-2026 
Dear Sir/ Ma’am 
 
We, M/s HP India Sales Pvt Ltd who are established and reputed manufacturer of Desktops, Notebook 
& Workstations having factory at HP India Sales Pvt Ltd., Plot No. 3, Phase II, SIPCOT INDUSTRIAL 
PARK DTA Sandavellur C Village, Sriperumbudur Taluk, Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu -602106, do hereby 
confirm that the HP will be supplied with Preloaded Original OS (Windows) as required basis the 
Technical Specifications published in the bid. 
 
However, partner needs to resubmit the confirmation from OEM on preloaded OS once the tender got 
awarded and material supplied to end customer by HP authorized partner 
 
 
For and on Behalf of HP India Sales Pvt Ltd 
 
 
 
Authorized Signatory 
Name: 
Vibhor Gupta 
Designation: 
Regional Sales Manager 
Email: 
Vibhor.gupta@hp.com 
Mob.: 
+91 9654450334

--- Page 6 ---
HP India Sales Pvt. Ltd.  
Ground Floor, Block 2, DLF 
Downtown Commercial Site, 
Block - V, DLF City, Phase - III, 
Sector- 25A, Gurugram- 122002 
Haryana, India 
 
 
HP India Sales Private Limited. Formerly known as Hewlett-Packard India Sales Private Limited, Regd. Office: No. 24, Salarpuria Arena, 
Hosur Main Road, Adugodi, Bengaluru– 560 030  CIN: U72200KA1997PTC022727, Phone No: 080 3382 9000 Fax No:- 3382 9899 
Website: www.hpindia.com   
 
 
Date:  23rd  March, 2026 
 
 
Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas 
Indian Oil Corporation Limited 
Iocl Haldia Refinery) 
 
Sub: Malicious Code Certificate for GeM Tender ref. no: GEM/2026/B/7319588 Date: 05-03-2026 
 
(a) This is to certify that the Hardware and the Software being offered, as part of the 
contract, does not contain Embedded Malicious code that would activate procedures to: - 
 
 
(i) Inhibit the desires and designed function of the equipment. 
(ii) Cause physical damage to the user or equipment during the exploitation. 
(iii) Tap information resident or transient in the equipment/network. 
 
(b) The firm will be considered to be in breach of the procurement contract, in case physical 
damage, loss of information or infringements related to copyright and Intellectual Property 
Right (IPRs) are caused due to activation of any such malicious code in embedded software. 
 
Thanks & Regards, 
For HP India Sales Private Limited 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Name: Shantanu Chatterjee 
Designation: Enterprise Account Manager   
Email: shantanu.chatterjee1@hp.com 
Phone Number: + 91 9810000333
